//: PairSlash root TypeScript configuration. Phase M2: all packages converted to .ts (Node 24 type-stripping at runtime, no build step). Phase M3: strictness is progressively tightened via a dual-config mechanism — packages graduate from this relaxed config into tsconfig.strict.json as type annotations are completed. When all packages have graduated, strict flags move here and tsconfig.strict.json is deleted. JS/TS coexistence is permitted via allowJs; only .ts roots are included so .js files stay unchecked.
